Causal_Scenario: Pedestrian detector misses a pedestrian under shadow or glare
Related_Constraint: Planner must not continue near uncertain detections

Causal_Scenario: Planner never receives a positive pedestrian detection
Planner treats traffic-light presence as insufficient evidence to stop
Root_Cause: Detector lacks red yellow green state awareness

Causal_Scenario: Vehicle detector falsely detects a vehicle ahead
Operator does not notice automation failure
Weather changes to rain but system remains autonomous
Operator releases override before vehicle is stable
